Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Public Administrator.

The Court informed Mr. Ferdon that the petition needs to be amended to request authority to enter into the stipulation. Mr. Ferdon stated that the only thing before the Court are their fees, that it is the only issue affected by the First and Final Account, that the property has been vacated and that the sale is done. In addition, Mr. Ferdon stated that they are reducing their fees, that the order on the sale was never vacated, that the City Attorney did not charge any fees and that he does not know if the City Attorney signed a release on behalf of the Public Administrator. The accounting petition was continued to November 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1640-1644 Lyon Street, San Francisco, Ca 94115)
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $750,000.00 on the terms and conditions of the sale as set forth on the report of sale (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathon Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Ferdon stated that Ms. Feinberg had changed what he thought was the agreement, that he was prepared to have the Public Administrator appointed or put the matter over for two weeks. The Court appointed the San Francisco Public Adminstrator as the Administrator of the Estate of Katherine L. Chambers with authority to sell the real property (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-04-2009 Continued To Nov-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for for Betty Hedgeman (Petitioner). Shelley Feinberg for and with Ross Browder II. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA).

Mr. Meredith stated that he was informed that he had to notice the Public Administrator. Mr. Ferdon stated that he would confer with the parties. Ms. Feinberg stated that they would prefer that Mr. Browder be appointed. The matter was passed for the parties to confer outside the presence of the Court. The Court noted that if there is no agreement between the parties then the SFPA will be appointed.

At the second call of the matter, Mr. Ferdon stated that they had talked, that they will continue to talk, and that upon appointment they will ask for power of sale. The Court continued the matter to November 17, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Ferdon noted that he may be the only one appearing on November 17, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
